enriched_metadata.objective: Classify penguin species (Adelie, Chinstrap, Gentoo) and analyze morphological measurements across three islands in the Palmer Archipelago, Antarctica
enriched_metadata.sources: Palmer Station LTER & Dr. Kristen Gorman - Long Term Ecological Research from Palmer Station, Antarctica
enriched_metadata.features_description: 8 biological and ecological features: species, island location, bill length and depth measurements, flipper length, body mass, sex, and study year
enriched_metadata.representativity_description: Measurements of three penguin species (Adelie, Chinstrap, Gentoo) from three islands (Torgersen, Dream, Biscoe) in Palmer Archipelago collected during 2007-2009 field studies
enriched_metadata.sample_balance_description: Multi-class dataset with Adelie (44%), Gentoo (36%), and Chinstrap (20%) penguins representing natural species distribution in the study area
enriched_metadata.missing_values_description: Some missing values in bill measurements and body mass data due to field measurement challenges in Antarctic conditions
enriched_metadata.data_errors_description: High-quality ecological dataset with some missing values due to challenging field conditions in Antarctica; complete metadata and documentation available
